name: Nationwide, how common are ChatGPT lawyer screw-ups?

mainEntity.name: Nationwide, how common are ChatGPT lawyer screw-ups?

acceptedAnswer.description: Increasing; 10+ sanctions in 2025-26. Context: Courts flagging fake AI cases; bars issuing warnings. Key factors: Litigation, contracts most hit. Practical guidance: Vet lawyers on AI policies, check bar discipline lists.
